meta.title: Organization Supporter
meta.description: Partner with MH Craft Studio as an organization supporter to help preserve traditional Khatam-kari through structured collaboration.

title: A Craft Preservation & Empowerment Project Starting From Zero
subtitle: This project aims to revive traditional Khatam craftsmanship while training and empowering refugees and vulnerable individuals through a small, structured, and transparent workshop model.
shortLine: We are at the beginning stage - building from the ground up, together with those who need a new path.

sections.title: Where Your Support Can Help
items: Securing a stable workshop space for consistent production.
Access to quality tools and raw materials for traditional techniques.
Program support for training and skill transfer in a structured format.

sections.title: How We Collaborate
items: Clear scope and objectives aligned with your mission.
Periodic progress updates and visual documentation.
Transparent communication around timelines and outcomes.

projectOverview.title: What this project is
projectOverview.intro: This is a small-scale craft initiative focused on:
items: Creating learning opportunities for displaced artisans
Building a sustainable micro-workshop model in Türkiye

impactModel.title: What happens after the first step

finalCta.text: We are not requesting funding for a concept - we are asking for support to begin a real working space.
